author: gb9t
content: Phase D COMPLETE: wave-D10 closed out per-syscall Tier-5 coverage. ~419 Tier-5 docs (UAPI headers + syscalls) with grsec/PaX-style Reinforcement sections integrated. Goal sub-task 1 done; next is long-tail driver enumeration + grsec annotation pass on existing 651 Tier-3 docs.
